action.reasoning: Observation: After 8 iterations the best nav_seek_success is still 0.0. The first simple GPS heuristic (iter 1) achieved nav_to_pos_success=0.56, while the later pathfinder hybrid made things worse (0.30). Local tests show only 25-100 safe_follow_steps per episode. Analysis: The custom pathfinder branch adds no value and likely wastes time on detours; the critical failing is the local controller logic (e.g. the `max(forward,0.25)` safe-zone rule prevented backing up when the human moved toward the robot, causing oscillation and lost steps). Decision: Abandon the pathfinder branch for now and run a quick parameter sweep over a clean GPS-only proportional controller with proper stateless/stateful rules. I will test 8 hyperparameter combinations across 5 episodes each (~20 min total) using avg safe_follow_steps as the proxy. After identifying the best combo I will hardcode it into model.py and submit eval.
